opportunities.title: [HIRING] AI-First Frontend Developer Intern (Part- Time | Remote | 5,000/month)
opportunities.description:
[HIRING] AI-First Frontend Developer Intern (Part- Time | Remote | 5,000/month)

Looking for someone who loves building with AI more than writing every line of code from scratch. This is a part-time remote internship (2–3 dedicated hours/day) where you'll work directly with me in a small startup team. The work is chill, but I do expect those 2–3 hours to be focused. Honestly, I'm not looking for the best coder. I'm looking for someone who's really good at making AI work for them.
